features.label: DevHub Panel
features.desc: New toolbar button opens a slide-out DevHub panel. Home screen shows all tools in a grid. Click any tool to open it, back button returns to home.
features.howto: Click the wrench icon in toolbar

features.label: JSON Viewer
features.desc: Paste JSON to pretty-print with syntax-highlighted collapsible tree. Validate, minify, and copy.

features.label: Color Picker
features.desc: HEX ↔ RGB ↔ HSL converter with live preview swatch. WCAG contrast checker.

features.label: Regex Tester
features.desc: Live regex match highlighter. Supports g/i/m/s flags. Shows match count and capture groups.

features.label: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
features.desc: Encode/decode text to Base64. Image tab: drag-drop or upload any image to get its Base64 data URI.

features.label: URL Encoder / Parser
features.desc: Encode/decode URL components. Parse tab breaks any URL into protocol, host, pathname, query params and hash.
